reason: Supersedes the earlier compact overlap333 MLP baseline for the new1000 MLP comparison.

random_replacement.implementation: standard_normal replacement in the standardized MLP input tensor
random_replacement.equivalence: Because each factor is transformed as (x - train_mean) / train_std before entering the MLP, N(0,1) replacement in standardized space is equivalent to replacing the raw feature by N(train_mean, train_std).
random_replacement.retain_rule: retain a factor only when random replacement lowers validation-month IC; if IC is unchanged or improves, remove it.

model_ic_comparison.description: old factors retained by 2020-01 MLP shuffle
old retained617 + all 1,000 new scorecard factors
old retained617 + 534 new factors retained by MLP shuffle

conclusion.interpretation: Under the more reasonable old-factor MLP baseline, the 1,000 scorecard factors do not improve 2020 OOS IC. Shuffle filtering is still useful because it recovers +0.001123 IC versus adding all 1,000 new factors, but the filtered model remains below both the old retained617 baseline and the old all1144 model.
